0	0	0	45	19	15	47	38	25	49	56	24	42	0	13	10	54	0	38	0	33	0	56	0	38	0	15	19	17	0	47	52	38	59	0	56	43	0	0	0	53	0	15	52	58	0	0	25	0	0	55	0	60	58	60	23	48	0	6	38	23	20	39	0	39	24	7	0	0	18	47	0	9	11	2	0	12	8	19	29	13	5	27	4	43	34	0	48	22	0	7	0	0	0	0	0	0	47	12	18	35	0	14	34	34	7	16	43	33	38	40	33	58	3	29	51	27	0	51	35	57	0	48	4	14	38	43	27	55	22	38	32	0	49	48	0	37	56	44	0	53	0	56	36	9	4	34	34	0	
4	0	0	0	0	39	55	22	25	23	0	15	58	22	10	29	29	25	18	29	21	0	4	24	0	0	13	54	2	1	18	16	16	28	13	59	33	28	11	1	0	12	0	18	12	0	55	0	50	0	0	6	0	48	37	32	13	13	0	0	0	2	0	20	40	0	0	33	17	26	55	17	44	31	0	34	56	56	0	28	0	46	58	0	5	0	51	30	36	2	0	28	3	0	41	5	27	39	3	0	0	14	0	8	11	33	0	40	9	19	2	15	38	0	36	0	0	0	0	19	55	14	45	0	0	0	38	31	58	16	0	39	17	27	45	15	16	14	20	8	0	0	11	21	7	23	5	0	0	44	

#Weights:

17	6	19	24	2	17	1	23	9	3	16	16	10	25	9	16	19	8	14	7	25	6	29	14	23	4	11	24	10	20	30	7	17	12	26	23	3	11	25	8	11	13	29	9	2	24	8	7	25	21	1	26	19	16	26	30	16	3	1	19	3	16	27	2	2	3	8	6	5	18	19	23	16	11	29	25	17	2	14	30	29	25	21	19	26	1	27	22	11	30	21	10	22	27	23	10	10	1	25	3	24	26	2	9	21	11	8	8	25	16	21	1	2	3	19	29	23	13	18	1	30	11	19	12	21	20	9	10	2	23	27	3	9	9	19	9	20	9	13	26	21	5	23	23	11	15	5	16	2	27	
99 #capacity

11 #k: cardinality
